Project Name
TrustShield AI

Technologies Used
Android Studio, Firebase, Python, Flask, React.js, Scikit-learn, NLP, OCR, REST APIs, SQLite, Google Safe Browsing API, VirusTotal API, Machine Learning, Web Scraping, HTML/CSS/JavaScript

Short Description
TrustShield AI is an AI-powered digital trust verification platform that protects users from fake job offers, phishing websites, clone portals, and online misinformation. Users can submit a job link, company name, URL, screenshot, or news article to instantly receive a Trust Score — classifying the source as legitimate, suspicious, or fraudulent — using real-time cross-verification across company databases, scam blacklists, domain analysis, NLP-based fake news detection, and OCR-powered screenshot scanning.
column11:
Technologies that are used :
Android Studio — mobile app
React.js — web dashboard
Python + Flask — backend server and ML logic
Firebase — user auth, real-time alerts, cloud storage
SQLite — local scam blacklist database
Scikit-learn + NLP (spaCy/NLTK) — AI trust scoring and fake news detection
Tesseract OCR — scan screenshots and offer letters
BeautifulSoup / Scrapy — web scraping for company data
Google Safe Browsing + VirusTotal APIs — phishing and malware checks
Datasets needed:
Kaggle fake job listings dataset
LIAR / FakeNewsNet for misinformation
PhishTank / OpenPhish for phishing URLs

column10:
Trackie is a native Android application developed using Kotlin and Material Design XML, designed to automate and streamline package logging and delivery management for residential complexes, student housing, or logistics desks. The application features an intuitive administrator dashboard with a customized Floating Action Button (FAB) that initializes camera and barcode scanning utilities. Incoming packages are rendered dynamically using a high-performance RecyclerView and customized CardViews, displaying crucial delivery tracking data such as resident name, room number, and arrival timestamps to minimize manual data-entry errors and optimize mailroom workflows.
